ddls:
CREATE TABLE "restaurants" (
  "restaurant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each restaurant */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the restaurant */,
  "cuisine_type" TEXT /* Type of cuisine served by the restaurant */,
  "address" TEXT /* Full address of the restaurant */,
  "neighborhood" TEXT /* Neighborhood where the restaurant is located */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website URL of the restaurant */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude coordinate of the restaurant */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude coordinate of the restaurant */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the restaurant, including specialties and ambiance */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the restaurant */,
  "opening_hours" TEXT /* Opening hours of the restaurant */,
  "price_range" TEXT /* Price range of the restaurant (e.g., $, $$, $$$) */,
  "rating" REAL /* Average user rating of the restaurant */,
  "review_count" INTEGER /* Number of user reviews for the restaurant */,
  "menu_url" TEXT /* URL to the restaurant's online menu */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to a featured image of the restaurant */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Comma-separated tags for easier search and filtering */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("restaurant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_restaurants_cuisine_type FOREIGN KEY ("cuisine_type") REFERENCES cuisines ("cuisine_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_restaurants_neighborhood FOREIGN KEY ("neighborhood") REFERENCES neighborhoods ("neighborhood_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "neighborhoods" (
  "neighborhood_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each neighborhood */,
  "neighborhood_name" TEXT /* Name of the neighborhood */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the neighborhood, including notable features and characteristics */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the neighborhood */,
  "average_income" REAL /* Average income of residents in the neighborhood */,
  "public_transit_accessibility" TEXT /* Description of public transit options available in the neighborhood */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("neighborhood_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cuisines" (
  "cuisine_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cuisine type */,
  "cuisine_name" TEXT /* Name of the cuisine type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the cuisine type, including its origin and popular dishes */,
  "popular_dishes" TEXT /* List of popular dishes associated with the cuisine */,
  "origin_country" TEXT /* Country of origin for the cuisine */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cuisine_id")
)
